title: Igor Roizen
text: Home * People * Igor Roizen Igor Roizen [1] Igor Roizen , an American computer scientist in the online shopping and product feed industry, previously affiliated with the Cognitive Systems Laboratory and Department of Computer Science at University of California, Los Angeles . In the 80s, he worked with Judea Pearl on search algorithms like Alpha-Beta , Scout and SSS* .
